items.title: Tourism Manager
items.description: Organizing travel services, working with clients and partners in tourism

items.title: Travel Consultant
items.description: Planning trips, selecting routes and working with global booking systems

items.title: Hospitality Specialist
items.description: Managing service operations, hotel processes and guest experience

items.title: Tour and Event Organizer
items.description: Designing routes, planning events and coordinating tourism programs

items.title: Tourism Entrepreneur
items.description: Launching your own travel business or developing existing tourism projects

items.title: Public Sector Specialist
items.description: Working in tourism administration and developing destinations

learningProcess.title: Learning Process
learningProcess.subtitle: From theoretical foundations to a professional career in tourism

stages.title: Theoretical Foundation
stages.description: Study of tourism fundamentals, geography, and tourism economics

stages.title: Practical Skills
stages.description: Workshops on tour organization, hotel services, and communications

stages.title: Professional Experience
stages.description: Internships at leading tourism companies and hotels

stages.title: Final Project
stages.description: Development of your own tourism product or business plan

graduatesWork.title: Where Graduates Work

categories.title: Own Tourism Business
